steps.title: Spot the defining difference in the notes
steps.content: The study rated sea palm's umami as “moderate” and ma-konbu's as “high.” This intensity contrast is what the student needs to highlight.

steps.title: Find the choice that emphasizes this contrast
steps.content: Choice A uses “the latter's umami flavor is more intense” — capturing the intensity contrast the student must emphasize. The other three either fail to compare umami intensity or stray from the seaweed focus. That matches choice A — A is correct.
